dog_services.name: All Inclusive Full Groom
dog_services.description: Bath, blow dry, full haircut, nail trim, ear cleaning, and finishing touches. Everything your pet needs in one visit.

dog_services.name: FFT — Mini Groom
dog_services.description: Face, feet, and tail trim. Quick tidy-up between full groom appointments.

dog_services.name: Bath & Brush
dog_services.description: Full shampoo, conditioner, blow dry, and thorough brush out. Great for maintenance between haircuts.

dog_services.name: Deshed Treatment
dog_services.description: Specialized shampoo and treatment to dramatically reduce shedding.

dog_services.name: Nail Trim & Buffing
dog_services.description: Careful nail trimming and buffing. Walk-ins welcome for this service.

dog_services.name: Flea Bath & Medicated Washes
dog_services.description: Specialized flea treatment baths and medicated washes for skin conditions.

dog_services.name: Puppy Groom
dog_services.description: A gentle, patient introduction to grooming for young puppies.

dog_services.name: Senior Comfort Groom
dog_services.description: Extra gentle grooming designed for senior dogs with special attention to comfort.

cat_services.name: Cat Full Groom
cat_services.description: Complete grooming for cats including bath, dry, trim, and nail clipping.

cat_services.name: Cat Nail Trim
cat_services.description: Quick and stress-free nail trimming for cats. Walk-ins welcome.

programs.name: Monthly Grooming Program
programs.description: Regular monthly appointments to keep your pet clean, healthy, and looking great all year.

programs.name: Weekly Maintenance Program
programs.description: Weekly appointments for pets that need more frequent grooming maintenance.

pricing_note: Pricing varies by breed, size, and coat condition. Contact us for a personalized quote.
